hero_desc: We commercialize Colombian eggs in all categories with reliability, efficiency and solid commercial relationships. From Bucaramanga to the entire country and the Caribbean.
solutions_sub: We serve consumers, distributors, restaurants, supermarkets and hotels — both in Colombia and Caribbean markets.
solutions_cons_p: Visit our store or contact us via WhatsApp to purchase fresh eggs in retail presentations, with precise classification and guaranteed freshness.
solutions_log_p: National freight service for any type of merchandise. Reliable logistics across the country.
solutions_org_p: Eggs classified by weight: B · A · AA · AAA · Jumbo. Traditional or white. Presentation adapted to your needs.
organic_p: We commercialize Colombian eggs with precise classification, guaranteed freshness and adaptable presentations for every client: bulk, pallet, retail or private label.
quality_c1_p: We have a solid network of producers that allows us to guarantee constant availability and response to high-volume orders.
quality_c2_p: National operations with export projection to the Caribbean, bringing Colombian eggs to new destinations.
quality_c3_p: Stable supplier network guaranteeing continuous supply in any season.
quality_c5_p: Long-term commercial relationships built on compliance and business integrity.
cta_p: We serve distributors, restaurants, supermarkets and hotels in Colombia and the Caribbean. Contact us via WhatsApp or visit us in Bucaramanga.
about_hero_p: Since 2005 we have been delivering quality Colombian eggs across the country. Based in Bucaramanga with operations to the Caribbean, we are a strategic partner for those who demand volume, consistency and trust.
about_timeline_p: From local operations to national reference with international projection.
about_1992_p: Commercial operations begin in Bucaramanga, Santander, focused on commercializing Colombian eggs for the local market.
about_2010_p: Company consolidation in 2018, building a reliable supply network and expanding national coverage with new wholesale clients.
about_2026_p: Projection toward international markets with first exports to the Caribbean. Positioning as a strategic Colombian egg supplier in new destinations.
about_val1_p: We always fulfill our commitments, regardless of order volume. This is the foundation of our long-term relationships.
about_val2_p: Logistics and distribution adapted to each client and market, from local delivery to palletized export.
about_val3_p: Over 28 employees committed to operational efficiency and the international projection of the company.
about_cta_p: Contact us to discuss volume, presentations, pricing and terms. We are the partner your business needs.
about_team_p: 28 employees committed to operational and commercial excellence.
about_allies_p: Companies that trust us as their Colombian egg supplier.
footer_tagline: Colombian egg commercialization from Bucaramanga. Operating since 2005.
footer_cert_quote: More than a supplier, we are a strategic partner for markets that demand volume, consistency and trust.
prod_subtitle: Classification B · A · AA · AAA · Jumbo. Traditional or white. Prices vary by volume and season — contact us.
prod_cta_question: Need a quote for larger volume?
prod_wholesale_p: For supermarkets, restaurants, hotels and distributors — in Colombia and the Caribbean. Product strapped and secured for export.
prod_desc_b: 46.0 g – 49.9 g per unit. Small egg, ideal for light recipes, snacks and preparations where exact size is not critical.
prod_desc_a: 50.0 g – 53.9 g per unit. Small standard egg, high turnover. Balance between size and price for distribution and daily consumption.
prod_desc_aa: 54.0 g – 59.9 g per unit. The most common standard for daily consumption. Preferred by households, restaurants and distributors for its size and yield.
prod_desc_aaa: 60.0 g – 66.9 g per unit. Large egg, excellent for baking, hearty breakfasts and professional cooking. High demand in supermarkets and export.
prod_desc_jumbo: 67.0 g or more per unit. Premium egg, maximum yield. The largest size option for high-end gastronomy, precision baking and clients who demand the best.
dist_p: We supply supermarkets, restaurants, hotels, distributors and exporters — in Colombia and the Caribbean — with constant availability, precise classification and guaranteed compliance.
dist_coverage_p: From Bucaramanga we supply the national market with export projection to the Caribbean, where we already operate as a reliable supplier.
dist_supply_p: Our stable producer network guarantees constant availability and response capacity for high volumes, even during peak season.
dist_class_p: Eggs classified by category (B, A, AA, AAA, Jumbo) and presentations adapted to each distribution channel.
dist_support_p: Dedicated team for order management and incident resolution in transit.
dist_who_p: National and international market — with the same standards of compliance and quality.
dist_form_p: We look for partners and distributors who value compliance and efficiency. Fill out the form and our commercial team will contact you to discuss volume, presentations and terms.
dist_form_message_ph: Tell us about your estimated monthly volume...
log_hero_p: We offer national freight transport for any type of merchandise. Efficiency, compliance and coverage across all of Colombia.
log_network_p: Merchandise transport across all of Colombia with compliance and efficiency in every shipment.
log_tech1_p: We transport all types of cargo by freight to any destination within Colombia. Total flexibility for your operation.
log_tech2_p: Over 20 years of experience back us up. Long-term commercial relationships built on integrity and compliance.
log_tech3_p: Proven export experience to the Caribbean with product strapped and secured to international transport standards.
log_benefits_p: We are not just carriers; we are the growth engine for your business.
log_benefit1_p: Stable producer network guaranteeing constant availability even during peak demand seasons.
log_benefit2_p: A dedicated account manager and direct line to our logistics operations center.
log_benefit3_p: Precise classification by category (B, A, AA, AAA, Jumbo) and presentations adapted to each distribution channel.
log_form_p: We are looking for partners who share our focus on quality and efficiency. Fill out the form and our team will contact you within 48 hours.
log_quote: More than a supplier, we are a strategic partner for markets that demand volume, consistency and trust.
log_form_message_ph: Tell us about your current logistics operation...
